category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a library for sharing secrets; official GitHub README describes Shamir Secret Sharing in GF(2^8).
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name are libgfshare; official GitHub repository is kinnison/libgfshare.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README explains the library, tools, and secret sharing behavior.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/kinnison/libgfshare, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes Shamir Secret Sharing over Galois Field 2**8 and splitting a secret into shares; source_facts.executables lists gfcombine and gfsplit.
